GILGAMESHARCHER-NP_ENUMA_ELISH.title: NP Enuma Elish
GILGAMESHARCHER-NP_ENUMA_ELISH.descripti: #Exhaust. Consume ALL your *NP Charge, at least !ChargeCost!. Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies, plus 2 for every 10 NP Charge consumed above !ChargeCost!. Deal !Divine! more to Elites and Bosses.
#Exhaust. Apply !Vulnerable! *Vulnerable. Against Elites and Bosses: apply !DivineVulnerable! *Vulnerable instead, and the enemy loses !StrengthLoss! *Strength.
GILGAMESHARCHER-RECITAL_OF_CREATION.desc: #Whenever your Enuma Elish manifests, gain 1 *Critical Hit ready and draw 1 card.
GILGAMESHARCHER-STRIKE_OF_EA.title: Strike of Ea
GILGAMESHARCHER-STRIKE_OF_EA.description: #Deal !D! damage. Against Elites and Bosses, deal !Divine! more. Gain !Np! *NP Charge.
GILGAMESHARCHER-RAIN_OF_A_THOUSAND_BLADE: #Playable only with at least !StarCost! *Critical *Stars. Consume !StarCost! *Critical *Stars. Deal !D! damage.
